review_text: The only difference between sleeping in a Rest Area and here is that here they charge you $50 for a 2m2 site. Staff were nice but the sites are super tiny and noise from trucks/trains/airplanes during the night is horrible. Been traveling arround australia for over an year and this was de worst place we’ve stayed in.
Beautiful pool, great owners, currently undergoing a lot maintence but enjoyable stay.
Good location, quiet and clean caravan park.
Fabulous park and great staff!
Very friendly a positive staff and everything done right, thoroughly enjoyed my stay,
Lovely little Caravan Park but no ensuites for Caravans. Plenty of new cabins with more to come
Great caravan park. Easy access.

Staff are all really friendly and helpful. They are a real credit to the park. I stayed in the unit type room had everything I needed comfy bed , great airconditioner and a full size fridge. Short stroll to the amenities block which was always clean.
Definitely surprised me in the best way possible. Will stay again.

Highly recommend this caravan park. Staff could not be anymore friendly and obliging.
Grounds and amenities were spotless.
Would definitely recommend.

Best caravan park to stay in townshill the people that run it are so friendly and helpful I recommend this Caravan park to anybody cause it's absolutely beautiful and clean We have been coming to this caravan park for years

Had an overnight stay with. Stayed in a pet friendly cabin with enclosed patio / yard for our little dog. Staff were friendly and accomodating. Cabin was clean and well presented. Washing machines and dryers on the grounds. Just wish dryer was use of card like washing machine. Bed was comfortable. Slept great. Although was worried we would bang our heads on the wooden shelf above the bed lol. Would stay here again. Thank you.

If I could give them a zero I would no different from the rest of the parks around townsville same shit different amenities😁 but this ones gotta be the most nosey&noisey park in townsville,full on i was packing up old man manager came over yelling and screaming his head off talkin like I'm a child ok when inside grabbed my whale grip he's screamed gun you got a gun right im calling the police like 👍 ok,mate😂 next thing im being handcuffed and there searching my camper,they found nothing,cops looked pretty passed at the manager,let me go and said take care joshi🫡 anyway yeah it's amenities are tiny and dirty pool was green and management was harassing 🤮makes me sick thinking bout the parks in this town,

Coral Coast Tourist Park has fabulous pet friendly accommodation.    Our cabin was spotless, and was so well equipped with a full size fridge, a microwave and a  fabulous oven/grill. The shower was hot with great water pressure.   I can't recommend this accommodation highly enough.   Definitely 5 stars from me.
Reception severvices exellent funny birds feeding at 4 pm

OK called yesterday afternoon just 10 minutes up the road ! Enquiring about a room for 2 to 3 nights with two dogs , no stress no dramas reception lady said book the room now . Can we come & have a look !!! NO give me your card details and I'll hold the room ! WE arrive to have a look 10 minutes later . Waving a hand in the air it's gone goodbye to my Wife ... lol lol lost my business and word of mouth travels....

Too many rules and no pet friendly shaded or air-conditioned areas.|18000 km around Australia and no other park had as many rules as this one. We met two nice couples, we all arrived at the same time and we all said: too many rules here! Too much airplane noise. Mediocre facilities.

Op zich prima camping, sanitair is uitstekend. Maar de locatie is waardeloos: Aan een drukke weg en naast een militaire luchtmachtbasis. Veel, héél veel lawaai dus. Ook helemaal niets in de directe omgeving, geen winkelsgeen restaurants. Volgens mij heb je niet veel keus in Townsville, anders zou ik deze camping mijden.
Great friendly service and highly recommend.
Easy to find and lovely clean comfy room for my overnight stay before heading to the airport
Everything was great and the amenities were very clean! It’s a quiet campground with good spots, though the location is a bit remote.
Very clean. It's great you can leave you van hooked up. Great overnight stay if you are travelling.
Room lovely, fresh and clean. Great location for airport, only a short drive.
Good sites. Can't comment on rooms as I have a van. But they look decent.

My friends and I booked a cabin for our vacation with two beds. After a long drive, we arrived and the person at the reception informed us that unfortunately, they no longer had the cabin with two beds that we had paid for. We checked the available accommodations in town and, of course, there was nothing left for that night. The person at the reception had no solution to offer, a very poor service. One of us had to sleep on the living room floor on blankets as a makeshift mattress. This ruined our stay in the city of Townsville. I would not recommend their service.

Netter Campingplatz aber unser Stellplatz war leider direkt an einer großen viel befahrenen Kreuzung und unmittelbar am Flughafen Gelände. Aufgrund der angrenzenden Militärbasis gab es Fluglärm bis spät in die Nacht

The location is out of town, which was ok. The road noise was a bit annoying throughout the night.
There was a RV bus that pulled up beside our site late at night full of young men.
They were particularly noisy & kept going even after I asked them to be quiet as it was after 11.30pm. The wonderful lady that I phoned was onto it straight away & had it sorted.
The amenities are very clean. The sites really are well planned for a short stay.
Sites are a little tight getting in
Great caravan park with very clean facilities. The showers were so nice and hot!! Only downside is the price it’s quite expensive $55 for 2 people powered site.

Stayed here for 1 night and then again, a few days later for a second night, found it very clean and tidy, I stayed in a cabin: it had everything I needed, nice pool and close to town. Staff helpful and happy. Not much to walk to from here and can be a bit noisy due to the nearby road, a shopping mall close by

Lovely ladies at the reception. Toilet is very clean. Caravan parking might be a bit tight but not challenging. I’m not really sure if you have a caravan more than 6m/ 21 feet, discuss it with the reception. Laundry is clean and coins are ready for exchange in the reception. This place has a swimming pool, small library and tv with Foxtel, and a cooking area. It’s very close with RAAF, you can hear plane but not late at night. We don’t have a problem with the noise, but if you are a light sleeper, it might be a different story.
Friendly staff.  Great location. Amenities for all to share and clean.  Cabins great also. Rest,  relax,  put your feet up.
The park is very well kept. Amenities are very well cleaned. The powered sites are roomy and very easy to reverse  into. .
Friendly and accommodating staff, clean quality accommodation. Location close to airport, however, located near industrial area on a busy road with heavy traffic.
Friendly and clean. Hot showers. Well run. A little expensive.
Great park, of the main highway, so at night pretty quite

Great park, been a couple times good prices for camping and always clean. Lots of space.
Keep up the good work
Nice and tidy van park easy parking clean and tidy toilet and shower block and park not too far from city centre good prices 3
This place is orsome the sites are staggered so you don't look into each other's sites. Grounds are well looked after  lots of shade trees, good service roads, large and very clean amenities.
Great place to stay if you have dogs with you. Staff were good to deal with. The shower and toilet blocks were immaculately clean during our stay.
As usual, great park. Our go to place when in Townsville

Other than the industrial area around you the area is fairly quiet and you get a good sleep. Staff were as helpful as always. I have stayed here quite a few times and don't hesitate recommending it as a good place to stay.
Clean well run caravan resort

Staff were very helpful, site was big enough for our big rig amenities clean and laundry facilities $4 👍
Thank you for our perfect stay

Our ★★★★★ cabin experience matched the advertised rating. Great gardens, shrubs, trees.
Accessibility & disability parking: easy access off Ingham road. i did not see disability services; ask the manager.
Book & check-in: use website
Cabins: basic but well maintained
Powered sites: lots of shade, concreted annex area.
Amenities blocks:  extensive, somewhat dated
Kitchen: BBQs, stove, hot water, boiling water, microwave, dining hall.
Cafe, kiosk, store: few ice creams and basic supplies.
Nearby restaurants: none; you will need to drive
Phone & WiFi speed: 4Mbps us too slow for video. Telstra 5G.
Extras: Pool is small but tidy.
Laundry, iron. Dump point. Gas bottle exchange. Ice. Potable water.
★★ This is a property that focuses on the needs of price conscious travellers.

Extremely clean facilities and grounds. Friendly people, Variety of accommodation to choose from . Great size and shady van sites Easy access to city , beaches and shopping Would recommend for an overnight or longer stay .we will be back. pet friendly

We booked in the pet friendly room for Christmas Day and Boxing Day, staff were quite communicative on how to check in, and the room was great. The room was super clean, and the bed was comfortable. Loved that the pet friendly accomodation had a gate on the verandah so our dog could sit outside with us. Would stay here again if we ever pass through.

A great friendly place to stay, we stayed with our puppy, nice fenced area in unit for puppy.
Great pool and Bbq area. Overall a great place to stay

Excellent cabin.very friendly staff.  Great place for dogs.
Well laid out. Clean and modern. Facilities were 1st class. Will definitely stay again when in Townsville.
Great service at this park 👍

There's nothing Not to like about The Coral Coast Tourist Park.
From the always happy and (very) accomodating ladies in reception, through to the groundspeople and cleaners. Our stay was stress free. Everything was clean, tidy and organised with easy access from every point in the (not too big) park. Being newby's to caravan park life (including our dog), we had the perfect initiation.
For those with big dogs who need more than a lap around the park, you can drive down the end of Mather street (1.3km) to the soccer fields and an off leash dog park. It's a good walk in its self on weekends when there is not too much traffic.
The caravan park is situated at the far end opposite the RAAF Base, so we got to see some awesome exercises with Chinooks,   Globemasters and Super Hornets on a couple of occasions.
From our point of view, this will be our go to park in Townsville for future visits. No need to waste time 'shopping around'.
Thanks Lyn, Hayley and your significant others for making us feel at home. We look forward to seeing you in the not too distant future.

A lovely cabin with excellent hot water pressure and plenty of room for doggos to walk. All the facilities one needs for a very relaxing stay.
Unfortunately, my doggo has a barge in attitude and scares some folks and their dogs.
I also had a motion sensor light that was on the cabin wall next to me as it covered the exit areas. It was on most of the time but not really an issue.
Huge shout out to Hayley for the welcome and to Glen for saving me from the imagined dangersome extra parking areas. I thought they were doing a recce for something unfriendly. My PTSD war service veteran kicked in cos I'm not so brave these days.
Terribly embarrassing lol 😁🤭
Neat tidy park. Close to everything we needed. Nice quiet stay
Lovely staff who really made the stay.  What an awesome idea putting on a free sausage sizzle for guests to attend. We met some lovely people due to that social event - thank you.
Staff went out of their way to accommodate us with our caravan. Amenities excellent great place to stay.

Lovely clean park in a central location to the city, shops, Castle Hill and The Strand. Dog friendly with generous sites that the car and caravan could stay hitched, amenities block has many toilets and shower bays with shower curtains and is kept immaculately clean and laundry is adequate with washers ( 4 × $1 per load) , dryers, iron with board and plenty of rotary hoists for drying clothes. Fairly quiet at night considering it's on Ingham Road and near the airport. My power box was really far away and so I had to drive to Bunnings to get a longer power cord so be prepared.

I’ve stayed here a few times, in a dog friendly cabin, on a powered site and last weekend in the newly renovated disabled cabin. Great park! Fantastic managers and staff. Clean and well maintained facilities and only a short drive to the city centre and shopping centres.
This is my 7th stop on an extended road trip and was pleasantly surprised how impeccably cleaned and maintained the amenities were. It was never in disarray not even once.

Nice Park with very clean amenities. Sites not overly big but lots have cement slabs for Annex. Away from town but easy driving distance and ubers available. Near RAAF base and had 1 night when they must have been doing night training but didn't go too late. Cabins look near and tidy. Recommend this park.

Just don’t get how it’s rated so high. After having nowhere else to stay we landed here. (Just like others we spoke to). With poor water pressure, late night aircraft noise, overflowing bins what’s there to be positive about. At $55 ridiculous dollars a night it’s even more  questionable how the rating is so high.

Well located away from the noise.  Loved the clean and tidy caravan park, they also have timing for the laundry. Not to mention their staff are so friendly and helpful compared to the Discovery on-call person.
Their cleaners also very punctual and friendly.  We'll be back !
Very nice and clean. Close to airport and the Domain shopping complex. Cabin was basic but clean. Highly recommended

Although set in the middle of an industrial area, once settled in you are unaware of the industry all around you. The happy, smiling receptionists made our first impressions great. They were very helpful and informative. The park is well laid out with most sites set at a 45 degree angle making it easy to back into your spot. Lots of trees and shade. Amenities very clean. Will definitely stay here again.

One of the best laid out parks I've ever come across,  clean,neat tidy..such a pleasure to look up at ceiling in amenities block and not see cobwebs and spiders etc hanging down. Ok, it's in an industrial area but once inside one would never know..10 mins drive to shops.This is a winner 🏆

Nice caravan site, clean and ample amenities. Concrete base for awnings.
RAAF base is very close, we seen jets take off and helicopters.
Dog friendly, nice staff.
Has a book and video library. Dump point, and camp kitchen ,laundry, and pool. The camp kitchen is not very conveniently placed though.
We stayed 4 nights. At the price, we would come back.
Lived there years ago am about to live there  once again it is a clean park set out well
Great park in a hood location. We stayed for a couple weeks and thoroughly enjoyed our stay. Staff were super friendly and the park is kept to an exceptional standard.
Would stay here again

Thank you Coral coast tourist park everything was what you advertised it to be beautiful pool, pet friendly lovely clean air-conditioned rooms with remote and 2 tv's  and seperate sleeping quarters for the kids thank you for a friendly and relaxing stay
Wonderful staff and park, handy location in Townsville

We always stay at Coral Coast as it has pet friendly cabins. But we would stay here if just travelling through on our own as it is so well maintained and friendly service. They even have soft toilet paper in the public loos!!!

What an amazing tourist park. The managers were so helpful and accommodating. Never have we had the option to bring our beloved pet inside our cabin in air-conditioned comfort at no extra charge. Everything was spotlessly clean and the gardens were beautifully maintained. Highly recommend and will definitely be back.

Bit of a shock trying to go for a shower at 8:45 both amenities locked and we weren’t issued a key. Residential park people were very helpful. But I’m concerned about going to the amenities block later. Proximity to city good and quietness park residents very good.

I would advise all travellers to stop and stay at the Coral Coast Tourist Park.
From the moment you walk into reception you feel at home.
The manager had turned on the aircon for me, and it was refreshing.
The cabin was clean and very comfortable.
The bed was so comfy.
It was all perfect.
While waiting for a taxi, the manager checked on me and made sure I was fine to reach my destination  the airport.
Speaking of which. If you need accommodation close to the airport,  Coral Coast Tourist Park is the place to stay, so close . No airport noise,  but not a long taxi trip away.
Five star rating in all areas.
Extremely well kept Park clean and spacious facilities.big and comfortable campervan sites. Beautiful garden. The Townsville airport is right next door but it did not bother us at all.

Lovely park, close to everything.
My sister in law lives there, very friendly,  pet friendly,  safe and secure environment, she loves it.
The cabin was very clean. The location is great. I would certainly stay there again.
The staff here are amazingly friendly/helpful. Toilets/showers clean. Cheap washing machines ($4 a load) I enjoyed my stay. Thanks!

Absolutely amazeing,desk staff so helpful,cant do enough,caravan site lovely,permanent person ,Ray,a big help,guideing us in,we keep comeing back,because aestheticly its such a beautifully kept park,and so quite you feel safe here,thankyou to all staff,for there politeness.
We had a great stay here. Amenities were always clean, nice pool & peaceful shaded area under the trees. Thank you.

Nice we'll run park, lots of trees and therefore birds to watch and listen to. Stayed 2 nights. The park itself is quiet, however it is on a main road so some traffic noise to be expected. Easy drive into Townsville centre. Lovely amenities and the laundry even had a laundry basket and trolley to use! Nice touch!
Can recommend.

Well appointed park. Lovely sites. Super friendly & helpful staff 😊
Would have been even better if it was closer to the city but saying this I would most definitely return to this park.
We stayed in a powered site. We stayed here 2 years ago and were very impressed so this is why we returned. We're glad we did.
Great place to stop easy parking.. owners are friendly and helpful

When in Townsville we always stay at the Coral Coast Tourist Park to enjoy its proximity to shopping & other services. The park is very neat & clean with fantastic shower block and swimming pool facilities.

Receptionist was beautiful to work with considering we were travelling last minute with our dog during sporting competitions and V8 weekend approaching.

We stayed in the camping powered site side which was spacious and clean. Nice and quiet. Cost efficient.

The best amenities I’ve had when staying on camping grounds. Clean and spacious considering sharing with everyone on site.
I've stayed in this park 4 times now over the years. I keep Coming back because of the large sites and the clean toilets. It is also easy access to the Strand
Great park near to  city. Clean, massive amenities block. Will definately return. Caravan sites easy to reverse into.

Loved the set up. All bays 45° reverse park. Amens second to none.
Only negative & not park's, is proximity to airport & highway. However,  both are quiet during night.
Great staff & yes I would definitely return. Thankyou.

If you're an aircraft nut, this is the place to stay. Air force take off's and landing quite constant.
Park facilities and amenities are great, swimming pool, library, laundry with dyers.

Der Campingplatz war für die Durchreise super. Es ist etwas in die Jahre gekommen aber wird sehr gut gereinigt (Bäder) und die Anlage ist wirklich okay.

Was uns wirklich genervt hatte:
Uns wurde bei der Ankunft ein Food Truck mit Kartoffeln angepriesen, welcher am Abend da sei. Wir unterstützen solche Dinge (speziell in kleineren Orten) gerne und wollten dort somit auch etwas für das Abendessen besorgen.
ABER: Es war milde ausgedrückt eine Frechheit. Pro Portion, welche $15 kostet wurde eine kleine Kartoffel in der Mikrowelle warmgemachte und in unserem Falle Dosenbohnen als Beilage dazugeben.
Da der Betreuende des Trucks sehr betrunken war, liessen wir eine Konfrontation aus. Ich kann nicht verstehen, wieso man so jemanden einen Platz / Empfehlung gibt!

Liebe Betreiber des Campingplatz; Ihr macht einen guten Job für die Anlage die ihr habt - der Food Truck ist aber eine Frechheit = lasst ihn einfach weg.
Well kept park, easy check in, plenty of space reception helpful, fire was a nice touch,  little walk to pub.

The park was spotless , amenities fabulous, pool lovely, sites generous . I didn’t use the camp kitchen so I can’t rate that . Staff were super friendly. About 500m walk from shops and cafes. A thoroughly great caravan park.
Lovely camp site. Easy to get Into town. Plenty of thi gs to see, bumbuk for ho.e made Ice cream and pickles

Sehr freundliches Personal. Die Ensuite sind nicht die neuesten, jedoch alles sauber. In den Ensuite hat es Dusch, Haar und Handtücher und ein Duschteppich. Der Strom ist stabil. Wasser ist vorhanden. Der Pool wird jeden Tag gereinigt. Das WLAN ist extrem schnell. Platz ist gut gelegen. Die Küche ist gut ausgestattet. Was wirklich schlecht ist, ist der Spielplatz der sollte schnellstmöglich erneuert werden. Bei den Ensuite hat es schöne Betonplatten für den Tisch etc. Super so hat man keine dreckige Füsse. Waren im April 2026 da.

The location is A*. But you pay for it. $72 a night for one senior citizen in a Hilux camper with an Engel chest fridge. The caravan next to me had twin air con, washing machine, Sat tv dish, 2 x air fryers and more and pay the same electric cost - something is wrong. The toilets and showers worked but are a little tired and need updating and expanding. But if you want to stay in Coral Bay you pay the price

Waren hier auf der Durchreise für 2 Tage.
Super netter Empfang
Pool war super zum abkühlen
Lage war auch gut
Für uns wars super

Blood stain on bed
Disgustingly dirty bbq
Pretty average for the price. Do better

Great park but you will need to be pretty self sufficient, basic amenities including inside the rooms. Dont get me wrong this is a good park if you need somewhere to stay and aren’t expecting anything full on. Staff seemed really nice too, would be awesome if it was more secure with gates etc Will definitely visit again though.
Located near town, Carnarvon. Site cleanliness was very good. Could do with more shaded sites |A pool would be beneficial. Value for money .
had a great time
Lovely little park. We stayed in one of the small chalets and it was lovely and clean, park was immaculate and the toilet and shower complex was also very clean and well maintained.
Staff very friendly. Rooms ok without being special reasonably pricey.
Very friendly and clean van park

Thank you for the wonderful service.
We had to cancel our booking because we had some trouble with our car on the way here. At that time, a very kind staff suggested that if we come tomorrow, we could move our booking for free. Even 5 days after, they could move our booking.
Sehr freundlicher Empfang - hilfsbereites Personal -  grosszügige und saubere Sanitäranlagen. Top!
Very clean and tidy! We have stayed here a few times now on our way up to Exmouth. Helpful staff and best of all dog friendly!

What a terrific experience! We were late checking in, but nothing was too hard for the wonderful lady in the office. If you want best-practice service at a tourist park, she's ya gal. The park facilities are the best for its price point. Ablutions are self-contained ensures. Great communal area, and the camp kitchen is terrific. Overall, this was a stay I'll always remember.

Lovely unhurried and not crowded caravan park in VERY easy walking distance of the shops, services and waterfront. Ablutions are in the private bathroom style and kept clean.|Shell grit covers the ground so very little dust. |Food vans frequently sell their wares from 5pm near the reception office. There is a service station  across the road for fuel or coffee.|The staff at check in were friendly and efficient.

Walking distance to shops, dog wash machine and dog-friendly cafe.
Onsite restaurant and cafe.
Close to the centre of town lovely staff on reception, clean amenities blocks, $6 for 30 minute washing machines, sandy sites, food trucks visit often we rate the fish and chips.
We loved this Tourist Park, the team there are super friendly, facilities very well maintained, camp sites large, it is peaceful and relaxing. Liked it so much we re-booked on the return trip.

Can't say thank you enough for the friendly, professional service and help we had from the staff at Coral Coast. We stayed a week because of car troubles and so glad we had been towed to a great caravan park. Food trucks most nights, communal fire when in season, but most of all, friendly and helpful staff. Thanks so much to Kathy and the other staff from whom we received help every day. The location is so handy too.

Lovely site and location. Excellent wash room and laundry facilities
Friendly staff.

Wir waren Anfang September mit unserem Wohnwagen für 2 Nächte hier. Tolle und sehr gepflegte Anlage. Freundliches und sehr bemühtes Personal. Saubere Sanitärbereiche. Guter Ausgangspunkt für Ausflüge in die Umgebung wie z. B. One Mile Jetty + Museum.
Wir waren vor kurzem (Anfang September) für 2 Nächte mit unserem Wohnwagen hier. Tolle Anlage. Saubere Sanitäranlagen und sehr freundliches Personal. Absolut empfehlenswert.
Very helpful only thing some sites are small no where to park car

We stayed in our caravan at the Coral Coast Tourist Park and were really impressed.

The location is fantastic, and the park itself is clean, well maintained, and feels very safe and secure. The amenities were spacious, spotless, and there were plenty available, so never any waiting around.

The pool area is beautiful and such a great place to relax.

They had a gourmet pizza food truck visit one evening, which was a nice touch.

Overall, an excellent stay – highly recommend Coral Coast Tourist Park if you’re looking for comfort, cleanliness, and a great atmosphere.

We were so over the moon with the greeting we received from Kathy on arrival. It really made our day and put us on a good frame of mind for our stay. The unit was super clean and smelled so fresh. The caravan park is situated so close to the town centre which makes it easy to walk there and get supplies and visit the markets. We both had a great time there and loved the caravan park. This isn’t the first time we have stayed there. The last time it was in an en-suite site and the experience was fantastic.

Beautifully maintained CP, super clean amenities and friendly staff.
An easy walk into the town centre.
A great stay.
Sheryl
Place a bit older but clean and tidy
Lovely clean amenities

Stayed in the park with my 88 year old Mother and a puppy that we had adopted from the local shelter for 4 weeks.|The staff were so friendly and helpful whenever we needed a hand with the caravan.|On pack up day one of the staff helped me collapse the awning and lift the fridge into the back of the car.|The manager of the park has arranged for food vans to call in most evenings (best Fish and chips I have had in a long time).|They also provide free internet and both of us were able to stream our favorite shows without any problems.

A pleasure to stay here, easy walk to the esplanade, Woolworths across the road. We had an ensuite site, really appreciated the towels, staff very helpful and lucky enough to get the fish and chip truck on one of our nights. Highly recommend.
Nice caravan park, friendly staff, clean facilities. Only downside was the police patrolling around... never did find out what was going on??
Camped here for 2 nights, bathrooms/toilets were clean and spacious.

A great Park, especially as it is the only one near the CBD.  All other Parks are further out of town.  Good sites.  Great facilities with ensuites for everyone to use, not just on some sites as is usually the case.

Easily one if the best parks I have stayed in.  Staff were super friendly and helpful. The toilets and showers are very spacious and clean. Our cabin was well fitted out and clean. Great location and within walking distance of town centre. Highly recommended
Great location close to town, good size sights.  1 drive thru site, first in first serve or book ahead
Caravan Park
Good caravan park.

We booked an ensuite powered van site which was perfect for our needs.  Not a huge fan of the sand/shellgrit around the sites as it just gets everywhere and can be quite sharp.  Staff extremely friendly and helpful.

Great park walking distance from the town centre
Concrete awning pads and shell grit around each site.  Facilities are ensuite style and kept extremely clean.  Pool area is also clean and the water refreshing
Communal fire behind the office each sunset and food vans visiting a couple of nights a week (fish & chips and pizza - both great!)
Staff are friendly and accomodating when we needed to add an extra day.
We booked a cabin it was very clean and best showers the towels provided were great definitely a good overnight stop.
airport nearby. secure items

We stayed in an ensuite cabin.  It was nice and immaculately clean.  The location was great, a short walk to town and the airport.  Food delivery trucks were on site the two days we were there, pizza then fish and chips, both were great.  Park seemed to be well maintained.  We were away for three weeks and stayed in some beautiful locations eg luxury tents.  When we looked back this had one of the highest nightly rates we’ve paid.  Above city centre hotel prices.  Nice but too expensive and so wouldn’t recommend to others at that rate.
Great facilities if a bit expensive.
Great Service

Great reception person
Location excellent
Enjoyed our stay
A great caravan park for Carnarvon. Good facilities, close to town and friendly staff.

Really nice caravan park with spacious sites and great amenities. 2 blocks with lots of toilet/shower combo. Loved the nightly communal fireplace and the visiting food truck. Staff super helpful and friendly.  Easy walk to shops.

Great stay, food
Vans every 2nd night and a fire every night
Well maintained with good facilities
The park staff went out of their way to make my stay as easy and pleasant as possible. They were incredibly kind, flexible and helpful.
Handy to town
Awesome place A+

Was within walking distance to town & beach,all the showers were individual & came with toilet, sink basin & a bench to sit on & were spotlessly clean.There's a nice pool & outdoor lounge with TV,fire pit & eating area where food vans pulled up.We increased our stay as we were happy with this caravan park.😀

The Park itself is lovely.  Nice location to town ten minutes to shops .
As advised by reception, LOCK EVERYTHING UP when the sun goes down as the locals come to do their shopping. It's not a great advertisement
But the park itself is just lovely.  Friendly staff.

One star is far too generous for the experience we had at this caravan park. In just one night, our car was broken into, and our documents and car keys were stolen. Unable to move our vehicle without the keys, the owners made their message clear: pay up or get out. We expected at least some commercial goodwill given the obvious lack of security, but instead, they called the police to force us to leave. Despite doing everything we could to find a solution (even though we were the victims!), we were simply too kind to ungrateful people with zero empathy. Too nice, too naive.

We stayed in an en suite cabin for 2 nights and we were so comfortable. The cabin and bathroom were clean, with all cooking items provided, all cabins had their own BBQs so cooking was really easy. Would definitely go back.
Location close to town centre, powered sites and amenities all good, staff awesome and friendly 😀

Excellent park for caravanners, well maintained and very helpful staff. Recommended
Update - when returned in 2024 the price had taken a big leap to $65 per night. Better options elsewhere now!

Sehr gut gelegener ,sauberer und leerer Caravan Park mit sehr freundlichem Personal, einem schattigen Pool und sehr sauberen Duschtoiletten. Wir hatten einen unpowered Stellplatz , da wir nichts weiter benötigen. Sehr gut für einen Zwischenstopp, wenn man von Monkey Mia nach Coral Bay fährt, oder zurück.
Was clean and well maintained, although the town has little to show or impress with

Have to go outside to take kids to the toilet 🚽 where you sweat lots. Not so good when a your six year old needs to pee at 10pm. So much ants. And the air con didn't keep the room cool. Door didn't lock with Key inside so had to keep getting kids from sneaky out all the time. The floor was oiled. Ended up with Roches in my car.
Great cen tall location. Clean, roomy, private ablutions

Great cabin when travelling with a dog. It even had it's own private garden. The cabin itself was lovely and clean. The staff were amazing. Accommodated our parking needs so that we could remain parked together. Easy walk to shops and town centre.
Handy location, staff great nice bathroom/toilet areas and washing machine.
Nice park. Good location close to the town centre.

Brilliantly located within walking distance of shops and sea front. Pitches are large, staff friendly and the toilets and showers are the best we’ve seen on our travels. Didn’t use other facilities but pool area looked good too.

Die Badezimmer sind erstklassig, der Park ist sehr gepflegt. Es gibt einen Swimmingpool und eine gemütliche Lounge, wo man mit anderen Gästen in Kontakt kommt Die Lage des Campingplatz ist ideal. Man kann fußläufig einkaufen und bummeln und ist nicht weit vom Fluss entfernt
Bester Campingplatz unserer bisherigen Reise. Gute Lage, ruhig, super nettes Personal, saubere und komfortable sanitäre Einrichtungen. Wir kommen jederzeit wieder.

Amazing hosts ! After some troubles on the road we were happy to deal with Karen and Joe who have been helpful, supportive and really nice to us!! Accomodations, campsites and amenities were really great. We really recommend. Again,  a big big thank you to Karen and Jo!!

Super polite and friendly staff, nothing's an issue. Very refreshing compared to most other CPs 👍
Park is super clean, fire and food truck most nights.
Very clean and tidy park with nice, happy staff

We stayed in a basic cabin for 11 days. The staff were generally really nice and accommodating. However the standard of a basic cabin/donga was awful. Unclean when we arrived, they need a long nozzle vacuum cleaner to remove dust and dead flies. The linen is clean but so yellow. The kitchen cupboards are peeling. The smoke alarm goes off with any form of cooking. The room is dark, due to terrible “curtains”, unless you leave the door open, then the flies come in as they’ve removed the screens and left the sticky adhesive tape. All in all they need an upgrade. On a plus the amenities are generally clean.

Really well maintained park with ensuite style ablutions. Right in town so handy to shops. Nice pool, entertainment area etc.
Best of all most nights a food truck is on site. Snapper was big, fresh and crispy from the fish and chip truck last night. Tonight it's Asian.

Perfect spot, clean and we will be back on next years Ningaloo trip, Thank you. Recommend Just lovely people who run park, so easy to deal with, we had to change bookings as places we were staying had closures and they were just so helpful. Great stop over point.

Amazing caravan park. One of the best in Western Australia. Very clean, well looked after and big sites. The staff are fantastic, and the amenities are spacious and very clean. We stayed twice on our way up and down the coast of WA. I each time the park had different food trucks for dinner and entertainment. Definitely one of the best parks I have stayed in the the whole of Australia. I would highly recommend this park to everyone going to or passing through Carnarvon.

Great park spent 2 nights on way to dongara  a bit wet where we were  nice to have the meet in the evenings  at the fire toilet block 1 of the best I've seen shower and toilet together  plenty of room clever idea staff very nice and helpfull  recommend  this site

Thank you Phil, Amanda and staff for making us feel welcomed, we had such a relaxed time at the Park. Attention to detail and guests needs are top notch specially the amenities, we wish other Caravan Parks could learn from you guys. We will miss the evening fire and laughter around the Fire Pit.
Gina will miss her cuddles and thank you for a wonderful week.
Warren, Peter and Gina. Xo

It is so nice to come to a Caravan Park with second to none ablutions! So clean and well presented. We are very impressed! The staff are also very friendly. Highly recommend for anyone wanting to freshen up when stopping through town :)
Fantastic clean park with great facilities. Prices are very reasonable. Staff were super friendly and helpful. Highly recommend.
Over priced village crowed and the place looks like a shantytown, only thing it has is the blue water views move on
These people have gone way above for us to make our stay memorable.

The best Campground I have been in 6 weeks! The staff is friendly and helpful. Nice and flat sites. The toilet is super clean. Coming from the salty showers in Coral Bay, this is really a treat! Walking distance to everything. Even have a food truck and campfire Friday evening.

Love the fact there is white shell grit instead of red dirt .
Lady in Recption is lovely .
Love the amenities they are all individual so loo and shower to yourself like your own ensuite would stay again .
A little pricey really but Covid tax is still a thing .
Be nice if they did pay for two get three like down the road caravan park .
Close walk to all things

Best part about Carnarvon. Excellent pool. Pizza van every Saturday with amazing pizza. The individual ensuite bathroom block was also great. Wonderful hosts and an AMAZING communal area with a camp fire, tv, pool and pizza van every Saturday. Highly recommend so great we even decided to stay another night!👍
Clean, well maintained
Not a busy site, best facilities we’ve experienced - we would definitely return.

Absolutely Loved our powered site for 2 nights here. Walk everywhere so fabulous location, fabulous pool was a bonus on a hot day to cool off, all ensuite bathroom blocks, hosts were amazing - lit a fire each night for guests to get together with then for a chat and drink. They also have food vans on weekends. Pet friendly- highly recommend

Very clean amenities. Within walking distance to town. Staff very helpful. Some shady campsites.
Unfortunately the pool was occupied by children most of the time.

toller platz ...
sehr nettes Personal und sehr ruhig...
die Duschen sind traumhaft ...und für Tagesausflüge zu den Blowholes usw sehr gut geeignet...
All good , Coffee Van was a bonus.Bed Comfortable

Sanitaires top. Il s'agit d'une cabine individuelle avec WC, lavabo et douche.
Tres proche du "centre" ville, tout peut se faire à pieds. Terrain correct. Piscine.
Arrived after hours requiring a powered caravan site. Customer service is impeccable. Great facilities.

We came for 2 nights. It’s was very great ! The room and the camping are great and very quiet ! We enjoy our time in this accommodation with good pool. Thanks so much at the receptionist, she are lovely :)
I stayed over the weekend in the one bedroom spa unit. Everything was great about our stay, the staff member was lovely and the accomodation was excellent. We had everything we needed, thank you!

Schöner Campingplatz mit schattigen Stellplätzen. Sehr saubere Sanitäranlagen mit Dusche, Toilette, Waschbecken und Spiegel in einem Raum. Sehr freundliche Mitarbeiterin (Jane 😊). Da nicht so viel los war, konnten wir uns den Platz raussuchen. Auch in der Campkitchen war Alles da, was man braucht. Kommen gerne wieder.
Amazing, pls ask for place R2

What an awesome pet friendly caravan park right in the heart of Carnarvon. Has large, flat sites, some with slabs all on crushed shell base. They have a communal sitting area, a small pool, Camp kitchen, laundry, games room, unisex amenities, and dump point. You can walk to the town and waterfront where the sunsets are pretty spectacular. The staff were awesome and helpful. Would recommend this park if you're in Carnarvon. Unfortunately, this time, I forgot to get some pictures whilst there 🤦.
Ein Campingplatz für die Durchreise...Campingküche cool, Duschen  WC super...ein kleiner Pool..wenig Schatten..

The staff were always incredibly friendly and helpful and our site was quiet and private with no traffic noise. Although we didn’t use the facilities, they appeared modern and very clean. Would recommend this park

Best Caravan Park since we left Broome, not over run with kids, everything is very clean and spacious. Amenities are private, clean and safe. Definitely would recommend to anyone travelling through Carnarvon to stop at this tourist park.
Best amenities blocks ever like having your own ensuite. Walk to Woolworths & shops. Good outdoor area large TV & next to pool. $45  unpowered site bit steep but hols time that's life. Good place

We stayed here twice on our way up and down the coast, nice caravan park with good shower facilities. We stayed in a powered site. Close to everything you need in town. Easy place to spend the night on the way through.
Nice team  of whorck  and amazing people
Very busy caravan park, but close to the beach

Coral Coast tourist Park  is a great park. Staff are all fantastic, hard working, friendly.  Ensuite bathrooms spotlessly clean. Can't  fault anything.  No problems  at all. No safety  concerns as stated in the media regarding the town of Carnarvon. Lovely area to visit. Thanks everyone  at the park. We'll see you  next year. Regards  Mr and Mrs Morgan.  Site 90

One of the best value for money accommodations I've stayed on a 10 k roadtrip so far.
Nice clean pool, all amenities you need and all in brilliant clean conditions.
Budget Cabins perfect value for money. Good night sleep as it was really quiet or well isolated.
And staff is super friendly.
Location in walking distance to town centre and supermarket (not a lot going on in Carnarvon, but that's not the hosts problem :))

The only point to deduct are a couple of dusty corners in the Cabins and Windows that could do with a wipe.

Thanks :)

Back in April we were supposed to drive through Carnarvon but had a breakdown and limped into town around 7pm. We were on the main street trying to find a place to stay when a couple of people saw we were out of sorts and stopped to help.

They were from the Coral Coast Tourist Park and had finished work for the day but interrupted their night to help us out. They walked all the way back to the caravan park, opened up, checked us in and guided us to our rooms! Incredibly friendly country town service which made our impromptu stay in Carnarvon all the more enjoyable. Thanks guys.

We thoroughly enjoyed our 2 night stay at this dog friendly caravan park.

The staff are amazing; super friendly & helpful.
The amenities are fabulous!
Showers are hot, clean and there are multiple hooks, plus a bench seat - so nothing gets wet!

Great laundry, with industrial size machines (hot water wash too!) and lots of clothes lines.

Highly recommend booking here when you’re passing through.
Nice spacious park, toilets and showers very clean. Short walk to town.
Would recommend this to anyone looking for a long term stay. And the Care takers are awesome people!!

I was only passing through for I night. I could only book what was called a "budget room". Only because it didnt have an ensuite. I was pleasantly suprised when I checked into my little cabin. Tea, coffee and microwave if needed ( which I did) It was only a short walk to the amenities. These were also clean and well maintained. They were individual ensuites that had a locked entrance to the main walk area.
I didnt have an opportunity to get to town as I left early in the morning.
I noticed a food van selling fish and chips when I drove in with quite a few sitting out the front having their selection with a cool drink.
Close to everything. Walking distance to main shops and cafes.
We stayed at one of the powered site. The bathroom is clean, tidy, very well maintained. Fantastic facilities.  They also has WiFi. Mobile phone has 4G reception. The price is also very reasonable.
Good enough for a night stay. Did a late check in, early check out.
A great camp site very friendly and helpful staff. A big thanks to Grace.

Caravan Park is well placed close to all main street shops and well maintained and clean, communal toilets and showers are kept very clean staff are informative polite and tentative to guests requirements well worth staying, sites are easly accessed with most sites having a concrete pad easy conections to water Power and drains.  Fish and Chip van was on site Tuesday evening has IMO the best fish and chips this side of Perth again dont miss getting your order in early.

Nice caravan park. Good location. Large sites. Good drinking water quality too.
Apologies, I corrected my review as I mixed up this caravan park with the one we stayed at Coral Bay.
Stayed in a cute little cabin, which had cooking facilities. Every night we were there they had a food truck, which we wish we had the time to try.
Great location right in town. Very tidy caravan park. Staff was very polite and helpful. Lots of showers/toilets. Would stay again.
The staff are exceptional
